meta.title: DiaCorp Energy — The 1 GW Software Thesis
meta.description: Ten software platforms to accelerate Morocco's energy transition and deliver traceable green energy to industry.

meta.title: Services — DiaCorp Energy
meta.description: Feasibility studies, structured energy supply agreements, on-site PV, O&M, energy audits, solar thermal. The full solar ecosystem, by DiaCorp / KermaSys.

hero.title: From feasibility study to 24/7 operations.
hero.sub: DiaCorp and its EPC arm KermaSys deploy, operate and maintain solar solutions at every scale — from industrial rooftops to gigawatts.

cta.title: Got a project in mind?
cta.sub: Tell us about your site, your needs, your constraints. We'll come back with an initial read within 48 hours.

feasibility.name: Feasibility study
feasibility.tagline: Turn intuition into a board-defensible dossier.
feasibility.body: Our engineering team combines satellite irradiance data (MeteoNorm), production simulation (PVsyst, SAM, PVSOL), financial modeling (IRR, NPV, LCOE) and land screening to produce a bankable investment case.

utility.name: Utility-scale plant (structured supply)
utility.tagline: A 10 to 500 MW plant, built to support a 20-year structured energy supply agreement.
utility.body: Turnkey design and build. DiaCorp holds the SPV, arranges financing, leads the EPC (via KermaSys or a consortium), manages ONEE wheeling, and operates the plant across the full term of the agreement.
utility.typical: 8 to 18 months construction depending on capacity

onsite.name: On-site PV & industrial rooftops
onsite.tagline: You bring the roof, we bring the panels.
onsite.body: Photovoltaic installation on your own assets: factory roofs, parking shades, unused land. Partial self-consumption model, with optional surplus buy-back by DiaCorp or integration into a structured energy solution.

om.name: Operations & Maintenance
om.body: 24/7 operations platform, predictive anomaly detection via computer vision, on-site intervention teams, monthly reporting to your shareholders. Applies to your existing assets as much as ours.

audit.name: Energy audit
audit.tagline: Understand every kWh before you buy another one.
audit.body: Detailed diagnostic of your energy consumption: breakdown by area, identification of savings opportunities, quantified recommendations with ROI. Compliant with the AMEE / ISO 50001 framework.

thermal.name: Solar thermal
thermal.body: Hot-water and process-heat generation through thermal collectors. Use cases: agri-processing (pasteurization, drying), hospitality (pools, sanitary), cold storage (absorption refrigeration cycle).

hero.title: Let's talk.
hero.sub: Whether you're exploring a structured energy supply agreement, commissioning a feasibility study, asking a regulatory question or discussing a partnership — write to us. Reply within 48 business hours.

meta.title: Off-taker Portal · DiaCorp Energy
meta.description: Express your interest in long-term green energy supply from DiaCorp Energy in Morocco's Oriental region.

intro.title: Declare your interest.
intro.body: Five short steps so we can prepare a first proposal matched to your profile. We generate your pre-filled Letter of Intent at the end — for you to sign at ease.

step1.title: Your sector
step1.sub: The LOI template we generate depends on it.

industry.label: Heavy industry
industry.note: Mining, steel, cement, ceramics, automotive, textiles

agro.label: Agriculture & agri-industry
agro.note: Irrigation, cold storage, citrus / vegetables / oil processing

other.label: Other
other.note: Services, tertiary, public sector — to specify

step3.title: Your energy needs
step3.sub: Estimates are fine at this stage — everything will be refined with our team.

fields.cbam: You export to the European Union (CBAM exposure)

step4.title: LOI signatory
step4.sub: The person authorized to express this intent on behalf of the company.

step5.title: Summary & signature
step5.sub: Please review before generating the Letter of Intent.
step5.legal: By clicking "Generate LOI" I confirm I am authorized to express this intent on behalf of the company. This letter is not a firm contractual commitment.

success.title: Your intent is recorded.
success.body: Your pre-filled Letter of Intent has been downloaded. A recap email has also been prepared for our commercial team. We'll get back to you within 48 hours.

nextItems.0: 30-min qualification call with our commercial team.
nextItems.1: Site visit and energy audit (within 15 days).
nextItems.2: Formal commercial proposal and structured-agreement term sheet (within 30 days).

hero.title:
Sustainable Energy Solutions
for Industrial Partners in Morocco.
hero.sub: DiaCorp Energy develops structured renewable energy solutions for industrial partners in Morocco, with a focus on self-consumption, cost stability, and long-term operational efficiency.

activities.title: Four segments, one electron.
activities.sub: We serve the Oriental's most energy-intensive industries — the ones most exposed to rising energy costs.

industry.name: Heavy industry & manufacturing
industry.body: Mines, lead-zinc, brickworks, ceramics, textiles and cement of the Oriental region. 15-25 year structured agreements, competitive and tailored pricing based on consumption profile, private line or ONEE wheeling.

agro.name: Agriculture & agri-business
agro.body: Irrigation in Berkane / Moulouya / Saïdia. Pumping stations. Citrus, horticulture, olive oil processing. Seasonal offerings tuned to consumption curves.

cold.name: Cold chain & warehousing
cold.body: EU-export refrigerated warehouses (berries, citrus, vegetables). 24/7 continuous supply (structured agreement), battery-coupled reliability, carbon certificate for CBAM compliance.

zone.name: 100% solar industrial park
zone.body: Greenfield industrial parks around our plants. One plot, one energy contract, shared services. Land, grid and energy planned together for rapid commissioning.

models.title: Two ways to buy our solar.
models.sub: We deliver energy to you from our plant by cable — or we install the panels directly on your site. The choice depends on your site.

items.title: Delivery by cable
items.subtitle: Energy flows from our DIA1 plant to your site.
items.body: You touch nothing on your site. We generate at Ain Beni Mathar and deliver to you via the ONEE grid (wheeling), or via a direct private cable if your site is close enough to the plant. You pay a monthly bill indexed for the long term.
features: ONEE wheeling or direct cable, depending on geography
items.bestFor: You consume industrial electricity and you just want a green, indexed bill — no investment required.

items.title: PV panels on your site
items.subtitle: We install the photovoltaics on your roof, parking or land.
items.body: We install a complete PV plant directly on your own real estate: industrial rooftops, parking shades, unused farmland. Study, panels, inverters, mounting, grid connection, commissioning. You pay once on delivery — from there the energy you produce is yours.
items.bestFor: You have a rooftop, a parking or land available, and you want to own your solar production.

models.footnote: Unsure which option fits your site? Our team gives you free guidance after a first conversation.

scenarios.title: Every scenario covered.
scenarios.sub: Real-world situations you may run into — and how our solution handles them, without surprises.

items.a: Output drops but never stops — a PV panel still produces 20–40% under overcast skies. The ONEE grid automatically tops up via wheeling, your operations see no interruption.
Energy keeps flowing 24/7 through the national transmission grid. As an option, battery storage (BESS) can cover your evening peaks with daytime solar energy.
Irradiance drops by roughly 30% from July to December — this seasonality is built into the feasibility study from day one. Sizing and annual commitments hold across seasons.
24/7 supervision from Casablanca, predictive anomaly detection via sensors and drone imagery, on-site intervention within 48 hours anywhere in the Oriental. Contractual performance guarantee.

items.q: If I need to scale up later?
items.a: The architecture is modular. Capacity extensions are planned from Phase 1 — your solution grows with your operations without renegotiating the base agreement.

items.q: How do I verify what's delivered?
items.a: Smart meters, real-time dashboard, monthly reports compliant with ISO 50001. You see every delivered kWh and every ton of CO₂ avoided — directly usable for your ESG and CBAM reporting.

projects.title: Three plants, one gigawatt.
projects.sub: The DIA project unfolds in three phases, all in the Oriental region. DIA1 is in final financial close; DIA2 and DIA3 are in the study phase.

items.offtakers: Oriental farming cooperatives · Bouarfa mining · Moulouya irrigation

projects.extensions: Identified extensions: Driouch · Taourirt · Midelt — toward 1 GW.

partners.title: An ecosystem of established players.
partners.sub: Development, construction, financing — we partner with reference players in Morocco and internationally.

anchor.title: First agreement signed.
anchor.sub: An industrial partner has signed a Letter of Intent with DiaCorp to source renewable energy. Further discussions are in progress.
anchor.name: Taza Global
anchor.pitch: Agri-export group operating in Morocco with regional expansion ambition across the European Union and the Gulf. DiaCorp will provide the renewable energy layer.
anchor.footnote: Non-binding Letter of Intent. Commercial details are confidential.

loi.title: A clear template to start the conversation.
loi.sub: If your company wants to explore green energy procurement, download the appropriate template, complete it, and send it to us. Nothing binding at this stage — just a structured intent.
loi.industryBody: Standard template for any industrial client exploring a long-term structured energy supply agreement.
loi.agroBody: Tailored template for irrigation, cold storage, processing, and seasonal needs.
loi.help: Unsure which one fits? Email us — we'll guide you.
loi.onlineBody: 5 steps, 5 minutes. We generate your pre-filled LOI based on your activity profile.

track.title: Already at work in the Oriental.
track.sub: Before taking DIA forward, the KermaSys team has designed, built and operated power plants in the Oriental region for clients such as ONEE, ABENGOA and METRAGAZ.

items.name: Ain Beni Mathar ISCC Thermosolar Plant
items.scope: Gas combined cycle (2×150 MW turbines + 170 MW steam) coupled with a 224 CCP CSP field. KermaSys: I&C engineering, MV/LV electrical, fire fighting, network & data center.

items.name: Maghreb-Europe Gas Pipeline — Distribution Plant
items.scope: Gas compression and distribution station. 2 Solar 2.5 MW turbines + 3 RB211 G24 35 MW turbines. Installation and commissioning alongside the OEMs.

items.name: Site studies — Jerada / Guenfouda
items.scope: Land sourcing, on-site pyranometer irradiance readings, topographic and geotechnical surveys. Financial close targeted Q4 2027 for a Q4 2028 commissioning.

items.name: Regional MoU — Figuig / Bouarfa
items.scope: Memorandum of Understanding with the Province and CRI Oriental to reserve 400 ha of domain land close to the Bouarfa ONEE HV line. Studies to start Q3 2026.

services.title: The whole solar stack, under one roof.
services.sub: Beyond utility-scale IPP, DiaCorp / KermaSys delivers a full range of services to support your energy transition — from feasibility study to daily operations.

feasibility.name: Feasibility study
feasibility.body: Irradiance analysis, kWc potential, land scoring, production simulation (PVsyst, SAM, MeteoNorm) and financial modeling.

utility.name: Utility-scale plants (structured supply)
utility.body: Design, financing, construction and operation of 10-500 MW plants. Long-term structured-agreement delivery with performance guarantees.

onsite.name: On-site PV & rooftops
onsite.body: Solar installation on your own rooftops, parking lots, or land. Partial self-consumption, surplus integrated into a structured energy solution.

om.name: O&M / Maintenance
om.body: 24/7 operations and maintenance, scheduled cleaning, predictive fault detection, monthly performance reports.

audit.name: Energy audit
audit.body: Detailed diagnostic of your consumption, identification of savings opportunities, quantified optimization recommendations.

thermal.name: Solar thermal
thermal.body: Hot-water and process-heat generation: agri-industry, hospitality, cold storage (absorption refrigeration cycle).

products.title: We install what we'd recommend to ourselves.
products.sub: Direct partnerships with Tier-1 manufacturers. We only integrate what has proven reliable over 10+ years of Moroccan field deployment.
products.note: Bespoke configurations — systematic upfront study before any recommendation.

howItWorks.title: A simple and structured approach.
howItWorks.sub: Three clear steps, from the first conversation to a progressive commissioning.

steps.title: Assessment of your energy needs
steps.body: We analyze your consumption profile, your peaks, your operational constraints, and your ESG requirements.

steps.title: Structuring a tailored solution
steps.body: We design an energy solution shaped around your context — capacity, term, conditions, schedule — aligned with your industrial horizon.

steps.title: Progressive deployment
steps.body: Implementation in steps, paced to your operations, with disciplined ramp-up and the option to extend over time.

capabilities.title: Why industrial partners choose DiaCorp.
capabilities.sub: Five concrete reasons to structure your energy with us — beyond just delivering electrons.

items.title: Long-term energy cost stability
items.body: Long-horizon visibility on your energy line item, structured for the duration and aligned with your industrial horizon.

items.title: Reduced exposure to market volatility
items.body: A share of your supply secured through a structured agreement, insulated from short-term fluctuations.

items.title: Dedicated energy allocation
items.body: Capacity reserved and calibrated to your consumption profile, your peaks, and your operational constraints.

items.title: ESG compliance · CBAM ready
items.body: 100% renewable, traceable energy for your ESG reporting and your exports to the European Union (CBAM).

items.title: Scalable solutions
items.body: Architecture built to grow with your operations — disciplined Phase 1, extensions aligned with your growth.

team.title: Twenty-five years inside Moroccan energy.
team.sub: The DiaCorp / KermaSys team has built, commissioned, and operated power plants across Morocco and Africa since 2005.

contact.title: Let's talk.
contact.sub: HQ: Casablanca · Operations: Ain Beni Mathar · Regional office: Oujda

gallery.title: Ten products, one page.
gallery.lede: Each strategy distilled down to its interface mockup — the gesture, the tone, the information density. Just the screens, no pitch copy.

hero.lede: DiaCorp Energy is building 1 GW of solar PV in Morocco's Oriental region. The plant produces green energy at industrial scale. The ten software platforms in this deck turn $120M of CAPEX into $2.67B of recurring revenue by 2031.

thesis.heading: 100% green energy delivered to industry, plus the software layer that traces, optimizes and distributes it.

0.title: The bottleneck isn't generation
0.body: Morocco has 3,000 kWh/m²/yr of irradiance — one of the world's best solar resources. The challenge now is to accelerate delivery of this green energy to industry.

1.title: An open regulatory framework
1.body: Law 13-09 and decree 47-09 open the framework to self-generation and direct supply via structured agreements, with transport handled by ONEE under the regulated grid-access tariff.

2.title: Software captures 10× the value
2.body: Selling raw electrons captures a fraction of the value. Selling the API, the market, the carbon ledger and the digital twin around it captures an order of magnitude more. That's where the billions live.

strategies.heading: The software portfolio
strategies.subheading: Each card is a standalone product with its own business model, stack, and schedule. Together they form a $15B+ energy-data conglomerate.

data-center.name: Hyperscale AI Colocation
data-center.pitch: 500 MW of green GPU capacity for Microsoft, OpenAI, and Europe's sovereign AI.
data-center.description: Europe needs green compute. North Africa is 50 ms away. We colocate a Tier-IV data center inside the DIA1 industrial zone and sell GPU-as-a-Service certified 100% solar. Anchor partnership with Equinix / Microsoft to be signed before DIA2.

energy-market.name: Spot Energy Market
energy-market.pitch: Morocco's first power order book. Programmable agreements, T+15min settlement.
energy-market.description: Off-takers buy MWh blocks in real time, prices set by live PV generation. On-chain smart contracts (Base L2) automate execution and settlement. A VPP aggregator layer pools small solar producers and distributed batteries.

carbon-tokens.name: Tokenized Carbon Credits
carbon-tokens.pitch: On-chain RECs for Moroccan exporters hit by CBAM from 2026.
carbon-tokens.description: Oriental agricultural exporters, agri-industrials, steelmakers and cement producers are already exposed to the EU CBAM carbon tax from 2026. We issue Verra/Gold Standard-verified renewable energy certificates on Polygon. One token = 1 MWh + 0.6 tCO₂ avoided.

predictive-om.name: Predictive O&M Digital Twin
predictive-om.pitch: Computer vision + LSTM to drop LCOE by 20% — then license it across Africa.
predictive-om.description: Ingest inverter telemetry, drone imagery, weather. Auto-detect soiled panels, micro-cracks, hot spots. Cuts downtime from 15% to 3%. Sold as SaaS (~$500k/GW/yr) to ONEE and other Oriental-region solar operators.

industrial-zone.name: Green Industrial Zone ERP
industrial-zone.pitch: Multi-tenant SaaS for the 50+ companies clustering around each plant.
industrial-zone.description: Energy billing, per-tenant carbon accounting (Scope 1/2/3), intra-zone waste-heat market, logistics pooling. $5-50k/tenant/month × 400 tenants at scale.

green-hydrogen.name: Green H₂ Optimizer
green-hydrogen.pitch: Software arbitrage: electron → hydrogen → ammonia → Rotterdam.
green-hydrogen.description: Real-time decision engine: deliver the electron, store it (BESS), or electrolyze into H₂/NH₃ depending on market conditions. Export via Morocco's ports. Green H₂ market expected at $1T by 2035.

bess-arbitrage.name: RL-Driven BESS Arbitrage
bess-arbitrage.pitch: A Moroccan Tesla Autobidder — 40% IRR on grid-scale batteries.
bess-arbitrage.description: Reinforcement learning agent buys cheap midday surplus (sometimes at negative prices) and resells into the evening peak. 300 MWh of colocated BESS. Additional revenue from grid ancillary services (primary reserve).

corporate-ppa.name: Corporate Energy Marketplace
corporate-ppa.pitch: Match industrials, agri-industrials and port operators of the Oriental region with our capacity — 2% platform fee.
corporate-ppa.description: Corporate buyers input their needs (MW, term, geo). The algorithm matches available capacity, auto-generates the structured agreement, wires in the ONEE wheeling contract. 1-3% commission × $100M contracts × 20 years.

retail-solar.name: B2C Solar-as-a-Service
retail-solar.description: Consumer mobile app. The customer signs, we install panels + microinverter, embedded external financing. The monthly subscription substitutes part of the household electricity bill. Massive B2C scale, SaaS-like recurring revenue.

gis-permitting.name: Solar Site Intelligence
gis-permitting.pitch: The 'where to build the next GW' database — sold to African IPPs.
gis-permitting.description: Proprietary GIS combining solar irradiance, grid proximity, land availability, permitting status. Monetization: SaaS for IPPs, African governments, DFIs (AfDB, EIB). We already built it for DIA — may as well sell it.

financials.heading: From plant to platform
financials.subheading: Selling kWh brings in $120M/yr at steady state. The platforms multiply revenue 22× — at double the margin.

team.heading: 25 years inside Moroccan energy
team.body: Wahb Kermadi (CEO) has led gas and solar EPC projects in Morocco, Libya, and the Maghreb since 2005. Imchichi (CFO) brings deep financial-structuring expertise, with external financing partnerships secured for Phase 1. Mohammed (BD) has 38 years of African market experience. This software thesis fills the one gap in that industrial credibility: building and deploying code.

cta.heading: Prototype all ten, ship the priority three.
cta.body: These mockups are a visual demonstration — not yet production code. With a $2M engineering budget over 18 months, Phase 1 (Spot Market, Carbon Credits, O&M) is shippable and board-defensible.

footer.confidential: Strictly confidential · DiaCorp Energy internal use
footer.tagline: Solar developer-operator — 1 GW in Morocco's Oriental region. Studies, construction, operations, everything under one roof.
footer.disclaimer: DiaCorp Energy develops structured renewable energy solutions for industrial partners in Morocco. All engagements are subject to regulatory alignment and project-specific structuring. This website is for indicative purposes only and does not constitute a binding commercial offer.
